title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, UI
scenario: Notification master toggle remains OFF and individual toggles are greyed out when notification permission is denied during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and begin the onboarding flow.
2. When prompted to grant notification permission, tap "Deny" or "Don't Allow".
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications.
5. Observe the master toggle for Notifications.
6. Observe the individual notification toggle switches (e.g., for call alerts, message alerts, etc.).
expected: The master Notifications toggle is set to OFF. All individual notification toggles are greyed out and cannot be changed.
